200.description: Resolved ref map (`null` for missing / invisible refs).

results.description:
Map keyed by `"{type}:{id}"`. Value is a RefSummary for
visible entities or `null` for refs the viewer cannot see
(deleted, no grant, or nonexistent). The type discriminator
on the summary object lets clients narrow to per-type
fields (see RefSummary).

additionalProperties.description:
Discriminated union. `type` picks which fields are populated;
fields for other types are absent.

quiz_count.description: sg only. Count of non-deleted quizzes on the guide.

question_count.description: quiz only. Count of quiz_questions rows.

additionalProperties.title: RefSummary

schema.title: AppError
